content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Two friends A and B started a business with an initial capital contribution of Rs. 1 lac and Rs. 2 lacs. At the end of the year, the business made a profit of Rs. 30,000. Find the share of each in the profit.

Solution: We know that if the time period of investment is the same, profit/loss is divided by the ratio of the val

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

ue of the investment.
=> Ratio of value of investment of A and B = 1,00,000 : 2,00,000 = 1 : 2
=> Ratio of share in profit = 1 : 2
=> Share of A in profit = (1/3) x 30,000 = Rs. 10,000
=> Share of B in profit = (2/3) x 30,000 = Rs. 20,000
